meaning: n.俾路支人,俾路支人讲的伊朗语
examples: English, Baluchi, Urdu and Indian dialects are commonly used.
The majority of the Omanis are Arabs, although there is a sizable Baluchi minority (Iranian people).
That line runs like a thread through “The Wandering Falcon”, Jamil Ahmad’s finely crafted first novel of stories set amid the Pushtun and Baluchi tribes that make up Pakistan’s wild west.
